summary: This cluster focuses on the taxonomy and systematics of the freshwater algal class Conjugatophyceae (Zygnematophyceae), with a particular emphasis on the genera *Mougeotia*, *Mougeotiopsis*, and *Transeauina*. The research synthesizes historical nomenclature and classification changes, documenting the redefinition of the class and the evolutionary relationships among its orders and species. Key findings include the enumeration of currently described species and their distribution, as reported from AlgaeBase, highlighting a significant taxonomic revision within this globally distributed freshwater group.
